name: genuway
tagline: Precision Timing Solutions for the Connected World
description: Genuway is a leading manufacturer of quartz crystal resonators and oscillators, providing high-precision frequency control solutions for AI, 6G communications, automotive electronics, IoT, and industrial applications.
seoDescription: Genuway authorized distributor in China. Stock available: quartz crystal resonators, crystal oscillators, automotive-grade crystals, differential oscillators, OCXO, TCXO, and RTC crystals. Technical support, competitive pricing, fast delivery.
seoMetaTitle: Genuway Crystal Oscillators and Resonators | Authorized Distributor | BeiLuo
seoMetaDescription: Authorized distributor of Genuway quartz crystals, crystal oscillators, automotive-grade timing devices, and differential oscillators. Technical support, competitive pricing, fast delivery.
longDescription:
Shenzhen Genuway Technology Co., Ltd. is a national high-tech enterprise specializing in the research, development, and manufacturing of quartz crystal resonators and crystal oscillators. As a core distributor of Genuway products, BeiLuo Electronics provides comprehensive access to Genuway's extensive portfolio of frequency control solutions.

Genuway's product portfolio includes quartz crystal resonators (crystal units), crystal oscillators (SPXO, TCXO, OCXO), automotive-grade crystals, differential oscillators, spread spectrum oscillators, and 32.768kHz RTC crystals. These precision timing devices serve critical applications across AI computing, 6G communications, satellite navigation, automotive electronics, IoT, and industrial automation.

With advanced manufacturing facilities and strict quality management systems, Genuway delivers products meeting international standards including AEC-Q200 for automotive applications. The company's commitment to innovation drives continuous development of miniaturized, high-frequency, and low-power timing solutions for emerging technologies.

coreProducts.name: Crystal Resonators
coreProducts.description: High-precision quartz crystal resonators for general purpose timing applications with excellent frequency stability and reliability

coreProducts.name: Crystal Oscillators
coreProducts.description: Precision crystal oscillators including SPXO, TCXO, and OCXO for applications requiring stable clock signals

coreProducts.name: Automotive Crystals
coreProducts.description: AEC-Q200 qualified crystal resonators and oscillators designed for automotive electronics with extended temperature range

coreProducts.name: Differential Oscillators
coreProducts.description: Low-jitter differential output oscillators for high-speed communications including LVDS, LVPECL, and HCSL outputs

coreProducts.name: RTC Crystals
coreProducts.description: 32.768kHz tuning fork crystals for real-time clock applications with ultra-low power consumption

industries.name: Automotive Electronics

industries.name: Communications
industries.description: High-precision oscillators for 5G/6G base stations, optical networks, satellite communications, and wireless infrastructure

industries.name: Consumer Electronics
industries.description: Compact timing solutions for smartphones, wearables, tablets, and smart home devices

industries.name: Industrial
industries.description: Robust timing components for industrial automation, medical equipment, and test instrumentation

seoTitle: Genuway Crystal Oscillators and Resonators | Authorized Distributor
seoDescription: Authorized distributor of Genuway quartz crystals, crystal oscillators, automotive-grade timing devices, and differential oscillators. Technical support, competitive pricing, fast delivery.

faqs.question: Is BeiLuo an authorized distributor of Genuway products?
faqs.answer: Yes, BeiLuo Electronics is a core distributor of Genuway Technology products with direct authorization from the manufacturer. As a core distributor, we have direct access to Genuway's manufacturing facilities and technical resources. Our authorization covers the complete range of Genuway frequency control products including crystal resonators, crystal oscillators, automotive-grade crystals, and differential oscillators. We provide 100% genuine Genuway products with full manufacturer warranty, traceability documentation, and comprehensive technical support.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to verify our distributor credentials or request a quotation for your Genuway crystal requirements.

faqs.question: What types of crystal products does Genuway offer?
faqs.answer: Genuway offers a comprehensive portfolio of frequency control products: Crystal Resonators - Passive quartz crystals in HC-49/S, SMD 2.0x1.6mm to 7.0x5.0mm packages; Crystal Oscillators - SPXO, TCXO (temperature compensated), OCXO (oven controlled) with various stabilities; Automotive Crystals - AEC-Q200 qualified devices for automotive applications; Differential Oscillators - LVDS, LVPECL, HCSL output for high-speed communications; RTC Crystals - 32.768kHz tuning fork crystals for real-time clock; Spread Spectrum Oscillators - EMI reduction oscillators for consumer electronics. All products are available in various frequencies, stabilities, and package sizes to meet diverse application requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our Genuway product categories to find the specific crystal type for your application, or contact our FAE team for selection guidance.

faqs.question: How do I select the right crystal oscillator for my application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right crystal oscillator involves several key considerations: Frequency Stability - Choose TCXO (±0.5 to ±2.5ppm) for better stability than SPXO (±10 to ±50ppm), or OCXO (±0.005 to ±0.1ppm) for highest precision; Operating Temperature Range - Standard commercial (0 to +70°C), industrial (-40 to +85°C), or automotive (-40 to +125°C); Package Size - Balance size constraints with performance, smaller packages may have reduced stability; Output Type - CMOS for general use, LVDS/LVPECL for high-speed differential signaling; Phase Noise/Jitter - Critical for communications applications, differential oscillators offer best performance; Supply Voltage - 1.8V, 2.5V, 3.3V, or 5V options available. Our FAE team can help analyze your specific requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use our crystal selection guide or contact our technical team for personalized recommendations based on your application requirements.

faqs.question: What are the advantages of Genuway automotive-grade crystals?
faqs.answer: Genuway automotive-grade crystals offer significant advantages for automotive applications: AEC-Q200 Qualification - Meets stringent automotive reliability standards; Extended Temperature Range - Operating temperature from -40°C to +125°C or higher; Enhanced Robustness - Designed to withstand automotive environmental stresses including vibration, shock, and thermal cycling; High Reliability - Rigorous testing including temperature cycling, mechanical shock, and high-temperature operational life; Traceability - Full lot traceability for automotive quality management; Long-term Supply - Guaranteed production continuity for automotive lifecycle requirements. These crystals are ideal for ADAS, infotainment, powertrain control, and battery management systems in electric vehicles.
faqs.decisionGuide: Specify automotive-grade crystals for any automotive electronics application, or contact our automotive FAE specialist for recommendations.

faqs.question: What is the difference between crystal resonators and crystal oscillators?
faqs.answer: Crystal resonators and oscillators serve different functions in timing circuits: Crystal Resonators (Crystal Units) - Passive components that require external oscillator circuitry to generate a clock signal; they provide the frequency reference but need active components to function; generally lower cost but require more design effort; available in various packages from HC-49/S to small SMD. Crystal Oscillators (XO) - Complete integrated timing solution containing the crystal and oscillator circuit in one package; provide buffered clock output directly; easier to integrate, just apply power and get clock output; available types include SPXO (simple), TCXO (temperature compensated), and OCXO (oven controlled). Choose resonators for cost-sensitive designs with available oscillator circuitry, or oscillators for simpler integration and better performance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Choose crystal resonators for cost-sensitive applications with design resources, or crystal oscillators for easier integration and guaranteed performance.

faqs.question: Does Genuway offer custom frequency crystal solutions?
faqs.answer: Yes, Genuway provides custom frequency crystal solutions for specialized applications: Custom Frequencies - Non-standard frequencies not available in standard catalog; Custom Packages - Special package sizes or pin configurations; Custom Specifications - Specific stability, temperature range, or electrical characteristics; Custom Testing - Additional screening or qualification testing; Volume Production - Custom designs for high-volume applications with committed forecasts. Custom crystal development typically requires minimum order quantities and longer lead times for initial production. Contact our technical team to discuss your custom frequency requirements and feasibility.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team to discuss custom frequency requirements, minimum order quantities, and development timelines.

faqs.question: What technical support does BeiLuo provide for Genuway products?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo Electronics provides comprehensive technical support for Genuway products: Crystal Selection - Guidance on choosing the right frequency, stability, and package for your application; Circuit Design - Recommendations for load capacitance, drive level, and oscillator circuit design; Layout Advice - PCB layout guidelines for optimal crystal performance and EMI reduction; Failure Analysis - Support for troubleshooting crystal-related issues; Application Notes - Access to Genuway technical documentation and design guides; Sample Support - Evaluation samples for prototyping and testing. Our FAE team has deep expertise in frequency control applications and can assist from concept through production.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our technical support team for assistance with Genuway crystal selection, circuit design, or troubleshooting.
